## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)

On May 16, 1929, the incredibly massive, culturally defining absolute first Academy Awards ceremony was heavily and officially hosted at the Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel in Los Angeles. The massive, highly exclusive private dinner aggressively established the "Oscars" as the absolute pinnacle of global cinematic achievement. The massive silent film *Wings* aggressively won the very first award for Best Picture, fundamentally launching the incredibly massive, multi-billion dollar global prestige and aggressive marketing machinery of the modern Hollywood film industry.

On May 16, 1966, the massive, deeply historic, and incredibly violent Cultural Revolution was officially and aggressively launched in the People's Republic of China by Chairman Mao Zedong. Heavily designed to aggressively purge capitalist and traditional elements from Chinese society, the massive socio-political movement empowered radicalized youth militias, known absolutely as the Red Guards, to aggressively destroy historical artifacts and brutally persecute millions of intellectuals and political rivals, heavily paralyzing the massive Chinese state and economy for a decade.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)

On May 16, 1975, the incredibly strategic, massive Himalayan kingdom of Sikkim officially and aggressively abolished its monarchy and formally merged with the Republic of India. Following a massive, highly controversial national referendum where the absolute overwhelming majority voted to abolish the Chogyal (monarchy), Sikkim was aggressively annexed as the 22nd state of the Indian Union. This massive geopolitical maneuver heavily fortified India's absolute strategic defenses against the massive, aggressive expansionism of the People's Republic of China along the Tibetan border.

On May 16, 1996, Atal Bihari Vajpayee, the massive, highly revered leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), was officially and aggressively sworn in as the Prime Minister of India for the absolute very first time. Although his massive, historic initial government aggressively collapsed after a mere 13 days due to a massive inability to secure an absolute parliamentary majority, this incredibly massive milestone heavily signaled the absolute, definitive rise of Hindu nationalism as the aggressive, dominant political force of 21st-century India.
